jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Hopscotch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Hopscotch. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Hopscotch:
Hopscotch is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
